title: Magical Spicy German Pineapple Skewers
description: A spicy and savory German dish featuring pineapple, perfect for a date night, with a miso marinade and ovo-vegetarian friendly ingredients. This dish combines the sweetness of pineapple with the spiciness of German cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic powder, paprika, and cayenne pepper to make the marinade.
Add the pineapple chunks to the marinade and toss to coat.
Thread the marinated pineapple chunks onto skewers.
Brush the skewers with eggs for a glaze.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Let the skewers rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of German potato salad or braised red cabbage.
